tasks.title: Second Brain: Temporal resolver
tasks.description: Parse time expressions: 'this afternoon'→3PM, 'tomorrow morning'→9AM

history.note: ✅ Reminder handler implemented with temporal resolver integration, creates calendar reminders from natural language

tasks.title: Second Brain: Event handler
tasks.description: Handle 'Create event [details]' - adds to calendar

history.note: Auto-assigned by heartbeat - Event handler implementation started
First attempt failed (HTTP 400 - missing context). Retrying with better file references.
✅ Event handler created: parses 'Create event [details]', uses temporal resolver, saves to calendar/events.json, returns formatted confirmation

tasks.title: Second Brain: Recurring events
tasks.description: Support 'Every Monday at 9am' recurring patterns

history.note: Initial implementation started
Auto-killed after 72 min (>1h). Retry #2 spawned
Retry #2 killed after 93 min. FINAL attempt spawned

✅ VERIFIED via E2E testing (task-28): Recurring events work correctly. 'Weekly standup every Monday at 9am' successfully created with RRULE: FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=MO. Implementation complete despite subagent tooling issues.

tasks.title: Automate Dad Joke Video creation end-to-end

tasks.title: Generate Dad Joke #21 with performance timing

history.note: Task created - Jeeves subagent spawned

tasks.title: PostgreSQL Setup and Schema Creation
tasks.description: Install PostgreSQL 16, create mission_control database, run schema scripts for agents, tasks, subagents, and task_history tables. Verify connection and permissions.

history.note: PostgreSQL setup started
✅ PostgreSQL 16.13 installed, mission_control database created, 4 tables + 7 indexes created, npm pg installed, db.ts module created, .env.local updated. Ready for data migration!

tasks.title: Migrate Kanban Data to PostgreSQL
tasks.description: Migrate tasks.json → tasks + task_history tables, subagents.json → subagents table, agent-status.json → agents table. Verify data integrity with row counts.

tasks.title: Update Mission Control API Endpoints for PostgreSQL
tasks.description: Update /api/tasks, /api/status, /api/subagents routes to use PostgreSQL instead of JSON files. Add connection pooling, prepared statements, error handling.

tasks.title: Update Agent Hooks to Write to PostgreSQL
tasks.description: Update tools/agent-status-hook.js and openclaw-hooks.js to write to PostgreSQL. Test concurrent writes from multiple subagents.

history.note: Auto-assigned by heartbeat, subagent spawned: mock-1772724601405

tasks.title: Test Concurrent PostgreSQL Operations
tasks.description: Spawn multiple subagents simultaneously to test concurrent writes. Verify no race conditions, deadlocks, or data corruption. Stress test the new system.

tasks.title: Remove Old JSON Files and Finalize Migration
tasks.description: Backup old JSON files, remove from active use. Update documentation. Verify dashboard still works. Celebrate! 🎉

tasks.title: Error Log Cleanup - Review and close resolved errors
tasks.description: Review 14 errors in .learnings/ERRORS.md, categorize, close resolved ones (especially JSON corruption errors from migration). Set up better error logging/monitoring for future.

tasks.title: Dashboard Enhancement: PostgreSQL Migration Progress Widget
tasks.description: Add migration progress bar to Mission Control home page. Show: Phase X of Y complete, tables migrated, data integrity check %, time remaining. Real-time updates during migration.

tasks.title: Telegram Command: /status - Quick system status check
tasks.description: Add Telegram command handler for /status. Reply with: Tasks in progress, agent status (working/idle), recent completions (last 24h), system health (ollama/gateway/disk). No dashboard needed.

tasks.title: Task Cleanup: Mark completed subtasks in parent tasks
